TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 基國派部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 部落地理位置 == kya qutux betunux balay na qalang, cyux maki beh qalang ni Pyasan. 部落地名由來 cingay balay qu kyabil ru tuba sraral qasa.nanu yasa lalu Tayal qasa ga Tuba.
S.PHON: == ****** == kja qutux βetunux βalaj na qalaŋ, ʦ~ʨjux maki βeħ qalaŋ ni pjas~ɕan. ****** ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu kjaβil ru tuβa s~ɕraral qas~ɕa.nanu jas~ɕa lalu tajal qas~ɕa ɣa tuβa.
S.FORM: == 部落地理位置 == kya qutux betunux balay na qalang, cyux maki beh qalang ni Pyasan. 部落地名由來 cingay balay qu kyabil ru tuba sraral qasa.nanu yasa lalu Tayal qasa ga Tuba.
S.PHON: == ****** == kja qutux βetunux βalaj na qalaŋ, ʦ~ʨjux maki βeħ qalaŋ ni pjas~ɕan. ****** ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu kjaβil ru tuβa s~ɕraral qas~ɕa.nanu jas~ɕa lalu tajal qas~ɕa ɣa tuβa.
